title: Finding Patterns in the 5s Multiplication Table

steps.instruction: Write the first several multiples of 5.
What pattern do you see in the ones digit?
steps.explanation: The ones digit alternates between 5 and 0.

steps.work: All multiples of 5 end in 0 or 5.
steps.explanation: This pattern helps you quickly check if a number is a multiple of 5.

title: Finding the Pattern in Addition: Odds and Evens

steps.explanation: All the sums are even numbers.
All the sums are even too!

steps.subgoalLabel: Add one odd and one even

steps.work: Even + Even = Even. Odd + Odd = Even. Odd + Even = Odd.
steps.explanation: This pattern always works, no matter how big the numbers are.
